title: Froth-flotation kinetics: parametric first-order PINN C(k,t)
governing_equations: \partial_t C = -k\,C,\ C(k,0)=1\ \Rightarrow\ C^*=e^{-k t},\ R=1-C;\ k\in[0.5,5]\ (\text{rate constant})
expected_band: exponential decay of floatable concentration; faster for larger k; relative-L2 vs analytic < 5e-3

variants.note_en: The whole rate-constant family C(k,t) in one map: recovery R=1−C fills in faster for larger k.
variants.note_es: Toda la familia de constantes de tasa C(k,t) en un mapa: la recuperación R=1−C sube más rápido a mayor k.
